sidebar.advancedModeTooltip: Show all settings and advanced features

onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a transcription model

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: English only. The best model for English speakers.

moonshine-base.name: Moonshine Base
moonshine-base.description: Very fast, English only. Handles accents well.

moonshine-small-streaming-en.name: Moonshine V2 Small
moonshine-small-streaming-en.description: Fast, English only. Good balance of speed and accuracy.

breeze-asr.name: Breeze ASR
breeze-asr.description: Optimized for Taiwanese Mandarin. Code-switching support.

sense-voice-int8.name: SenseVoice
sense-voice-int8.description: Very fast. Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese.

gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.name: GigaAM v3
gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.description: Russian speech recognition. Fast and accurate.

canary-180m-flash.name: Canary 180M Flash
canary-180m-flash.description: Very fast. English, German, Spanish, French. Supports translation.

canary-1b-v2.name: Canary 1B v2
canary-1b-v2.description: Accurate multilingual. 25 European languages. Supports translation.

cohere-int8.name: Cohere
cohere-int8.description: A large, slower, but very accurate multilingual model.

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: OpenFlow needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: Required to hear your voice for transcription.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Required to type transcribed text into your applications.
accessibility.restartHint: Already granted it in System Settings? Restart OpenFlow to apply.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

capabilities.streaming: Shows live transcription as you speak

shortcut.title: OpenFlow Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts to trigger speech-to-text recording

transcribe.name: Transcribe Shortcut
transcribe.description: The keyboard shortcut to record and transcribe your voice.

cancel.name: Cancel Shortcut
cancel.description: The keyboard shortcut to cancel the current recording.

transcribe_with_post_process.name: Post-Processing Hotkey
transcribe_with_post_process.description: Optional: A dedicated hotkey that always applies AI post-processing to your transcription.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language for speech recognition. Auto will automatically determine the language, while selecting a specific language can improve accuracy for that language.

pushToTalk.label: Push To Talk
pushToTalk.description: Hold to record, release to stop

models.title: Transcription Models
models.description: Select a transcription model or download additional models. Different models offer varying levels of accuracy and speed.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{modelName}}? You will need to download it again to use it.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} is your active model. Deleting it will stop transcriptions until you select a new model. Are you sure?

rescan.label: Rescan
rescan.tooltip: Rescan for models added to the models folder or Hugging Face cache outside OpenFlow

modelSetup.title: Model Setup
modelSetup.description: Configure where speech-to-text and text cleanup run: on-device, on your own endpoint, or through a hosted provider.

test.title: Test
test.sttDescription: Record a short clip and transcribe it through the backend configured above.
test.cleanupDescription: Run a sample transcript through the cleanup backend configured above.

local.title: On-Device
local.description: On-device models are managed in the "AI Models" section.

url.title: Endpoint URL
url.description: Base URL of your speech-to-text server.

apiStyle.title: API Style
apiStyle.description: The wire protocol your endpoint speaks.

apiKey.title: API Key (Optional)
apiKey.description: Only needed if your endpoint requires authentication.

model.title: Model
model.description: Select a model returned by your endpoint.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

model.title: Model
model.description: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.

enable.label: Enable Text Cleanup
enable.description: Run an AI pass to clean up transcriptions after speech-to-text.

local.title: Local
local.description: Uses a local Ollama server at {{url}}.

url.title: Endpoint URL
url.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for your self-hosted cleanup endpoint.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

model.title: Model
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: Apple Intelligence runs on-device and needs no API key or model selection.

handsFree.title: Hands-free
handsFree.description: Listen continuously for a wake word so you can start dictating without touching a hotkey.

enable.label: Enable hands-free
enable.description: Listen continuously for a wake word — no hotkey needed. Say your wake word, then speak your text. Needs a local STT model and uses more CPU while listening.

voiceFeedback.label: Voice acknowledgment
voiceFeedback.description: Play a short spoken cue when a wake word is recognized ("Got it") and just before your text is typed ("Now typing"). Uses your audio-feedback volume and output device.

wakeWord.label: Wake word
wakeWord.description: The phrase that starts a dictation, e.g. "hey flow".

sensitivity.label: Sensitivity
sensitivity.description: Lower = fewer false triggers. Higher = easier to trigger.

listenWindow.label: Wait for speech up to
listenWindow.description: After the wake word, how long to wait for you to start talking before giving up. Once you start, the mic keeps extending while you speak and stops shortly after you finish — so short commands still submit promptly.

silenceTimeout.label: Stop after silence
silenceTimeout.description: Once you've started speaking, end the command this long after you go quiet. Lower feels snappier; higher tolerates longer pauses.

handsFree.tapToToggleHint: Tip: even without hands-free, tapping the hotkey once (with Push-To-Talk off) starts listening hands-free until you tap it again — no holding required.

modelMissing.title: Local model required
modelMissing.body: Wake-word detection needs a downloaded local speech model, even when you dictate with remote STT. Your selected model isn't on disk, so hands-free dictation can't work until you download one.

runtimeError.model: Hands-free stopped: the local speech model couldn't be loaded. Download or reselect a model, and if it persists try switching the accelerator to CPU under Settings → Advanced, then re-enable hands-free.
runtimeError.transcription: Hands-free hit a transcription error while listening for the wake word. Check your model and microphone, then try again.
runtimeError.microphone: Hands-free couldn't start the microphone. Check that no other app is using it and that microphone access is granted.

audioFeedback.label: Audio Feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play sound when recording starts and stops

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

experimentalToggle.label: Experimental Features
experimentalToggle.description: Enable experimental features that are still in development.

lazyStreamClose.label: Keep Mic Open Between Transcriptions
lazyStreamClose.description: Keeps the microphone stream open for 30 seconds after recording stops, reducing latency for back-to-back transcriptions. May degrade Bluetooth audio quality while active.

transcribe.title: transcribe.cpp Acceleration
transcribe.description: Hardware acceleration for transcribe.cpp (Whisper-family) models. Auto uses GPU if available (Metal on macOS, Vulkan on Windows/Linux).

ort.title: ONNX Acceleration
ort.description: Hardware acceleration for ONNX models (Parakeet, Canary, Moonshine, etc.). DirectML on Windows is experimental. Models may fail to transcribe.

startHidden.label: Start Hidden
startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start OpenFlow when you log in to your computer.

showTrayIcon.label: Show Tray Icon
showTrayIcon.description: Display the OpenFlow icon in the system tray.

style.title: Overlay
style.description: Choose the recording overlay: None hides it, Minimal shows a compact pill, Live shows transcription in real time as you speak (streaming-capable models only — look for the Streaming badge in the model picker). On Linux 'None' is recommended.

position.title: Overlay Position
position.description: Where the overlay appears on screen during recording and transcription.

pasteMethod.title: Paste Method
pasteMethod.description: Choose how text is inserted. Direct: simulates typing via system input. None: skips paste, only updates history/clipboard.

typingTool.title: Typing Tool
typingTool.description: Choose which Linux typing tool to use for Direct paste method. Auto will automatically detect and use the best available tool for your system.

clipboardHandling.title: Clipboard Handling
clipboardHandling.description: Don't Modify Clipboard preserves your current clipboard contents after transcription. Copy to Clipboard leaves the transcription result in your clipboard after pasting.

autoSubmit.title: Auto Submit
autoSubmit.description: Automatically send the selected key combination after text insertion. Cmd+Enter applies on macOS, while Windows/Linux use Super+Enter.

translateToEnglish.label: Translate to English
translateToEnglish.description: Automatically translate speech from other languages to English during transcription.

modelUnload.title: Unload Model
modelUnload.description: Automatically free GPU/CPU memory when the model hasn't been used for the specified time

customWords.title: Custom Words
customWords.description: Add words that are often misheard or misspelled during transcription. The system will automatically correct similar-sounding words to match your list.

voiceActivityDetection.title: Voice Activity Detection
voiceActivityDetection.description: Filter silence from recordings. Streaming-capable models use a longer VAD tail; disabling VAD records raw audio.

appleIntelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later with Apple Intelligence enabled in System Settings.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: API base URL for the selected provider. Only the custom provider can be edited.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

model.title: Model
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.

prompts.title: Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Select a template for refining transcriptions or create a new one. Use ${output} inside the prompt text to reference the captured transcript.

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Write the instructions to run after transcription. Example: Improve grammar and clarity for the following text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: Tip: Use ${output} to insert the transcribed text in your prompt.
prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to view and edit its details.
prompts.createFirst: Click 'Create New Prompt' above to create your first post-processing prompt.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.intro: Words, names and jargon you use — OpenFlow will spell them your way.
dictionary.emptyState: No words yet. Add your first one above to get started.

importExport.importError: Couldn't read that file. Use a dictionary JSON or a plain word list.
importExport.nothingToExport: Your dictionary is empty — nothing to export.

agents.title: Agents
agents.intro: Give any hotkey its own persona. Speak into an agent's hotkey and OpenFlow routes the transcript through that agent's LLM before injecting the result, instead of the raw transcript.
agents.emptyState: No agents yet. Add one below to get your first hotkey-triggered persona.

addAgent.title: Add an agent

formalRewriter.name: Formal Rewriter
formalRewriter.description: Rewrites your dictation in a formal, polished tone.

commitMessage.name: Commit Message
commitMessage.description: Turns a spoken description into a Conventional Commits message.

addAgent.cliDescription: Drive a real coding-agent CLI (Claude Code, Codex, …) as a subprocess in a project folder.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: When off, this agent's hotkey is unregistered.

provider.label: Provider
provider.description: Which LLM backend this agent's persona runs on.

model.label: Model
model.description: Model id to use with the selected provider. Typed manually - there's no live model list for agents.

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.description: Optional. Leave blank to fall back to this provider's Post Processing key.
apiKey.placeholderEmpty: Falls back to the Post Processing key for this provider

outputMode.label: Output
outputMode.description: What happens with the agent's response.

systemPrompt.label: System prompt
systemPrompt.description: The persona and instructions used to transform the dictation.
systemPrompt.placeholder: Describe this agent's persona and how it should transform the dictation...

test.label: Test
test.description: Try the agent on a sample transcript without touching your hotkey.

sampleText.placeholder: Type or paste a sample transcript to try...

delete.confirmDescription: This removes the agent, its hotkey, and its saved API key. This can't be undone.

agentType.label: Agent type
agentType.description: Which coding-agent CLI this runs. Selecting one prefills the command template and auto-detects the binary.
agentType.defaultsError: Couldn't load defaults for this agent type: {{error}}

binaryPath.label: Binary path
binaryPath.description: Path to the CLI executable this agent runs.

projectPath.label: Project folder
projectPath.description: The repo/folder this agent runs in (its cwd). Leave empty to run in a default directory.

commandTemplate.label: Command template
commandTemplate.description: Advanced: the argv template appended after the binary. Supports {cwd} and {prompt} placeholders.

outputSinks.label: Output
outputSinks.description: Where this run's output goes when it finishes.

history.title: History
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start recording to build your history!
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.
history.retranscribeError: Failed to re-transcribe. Please try again.
history.transcriptionFailed: Transcription failed. You can re-transcribe using the retry icon.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Analytics from your logged dictations — how much you're dictating, where, and how it's paying off.

overTime.title: Over time
overTime.empty: No data yet — start dictating to see your trends here.

privacy.title: Analytics privacy
privacy.description: Choose how much detail is stored locally when you dictate. This never leaves your device.
privacy.updateError: Failed to update analytics privacy. Please try again.

full.label: Full
full.description: Full: stores word counts, app/project names, and top keywords so every chart above is populated.

keywords_only.label: Keywords only
keywords_only.description: Keywords only: stores word counts and top keywords, but not which app or project you were dictating into.

off.label: Off
off.description: Off: no new analytics are recorded. Existing data is kept until you clear it below.

privacy.clearDescription: Permanently deletes all recorded analytics events. This does not affect your dictation history.
privacy.clearConfirm: This will permanently delete all recorded analytics data. This can't be undone.
privacy.clearError: Failed to clear analytics data. Please try again.

logDirectory.title: Log Directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored

liveLogs.title: Live Logs
liveLogs.description: Stream application logs in real time to diagnose issues without opening the log file. Only logs emitted while this panel is open are shown; respects the Log Level setting above.
liveLogs.empty: Waiting for logs… Entries appear here as the app emits them.

updateChecks.label: Check for Updates
updateChecks.description: Automatically check for new versions of OpenFlow

whatsNewPreview.title: Preview What's New
whatsNewPreview.description: Open the latest bundled release note without marking it as seen

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: Choose a sound theme for recording start and stop feedback

historyLimit.title: History Limit
historyLimit.description: Maximum number of history entries to keep

recordingRetention.title: Auto-Delete Recordings
recordingRetention.description: Automatically delete old recordings to save space

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Always-On Microphone
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep microphone active for faster response

clamshellMicrophone.title: Clamshell Microphone
clamshellMicrophone.description: Microphone to use when laptop lid is closed

postProcessingToggle.label: Post Processing
postProcessingToggle.description: Enable AI-powered text refinement after transcription

appendTrailingSpace.label: Append Trailing Space
appendTrailingSpace.description: Add a space after pasted transcription

keyboardImplementation.title: Keyboard Implementation
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: Keyboard shortcuts were incompatible and reset to defaults

pasteDelay.title: Paste Delay
pasteDelay.description: Delay before sending paste keystroke (in milliseconds). Increase if wrong text is being pasted.

recordingBuffer.title: Extra Recording Buffer
recordingBuffer.description: Extra time (in milliseconds) to keep recording after you release the key, to capture trailing audio. 0 = no extra buffer.

whatsNewUpdates.label: Show What's New
whatsNewUpdates.description: Show release notes after OpenFlow updates

appDataDirectory.title: App Data Directory
appDataDirectory.description: Location where OpenFlow stores its data

ggml.title: ggml
ggml.description: High-performance tensor library for on-device machine learning inference
ggml.details: OpenFlow's local speech-to-text is built on transcribe.cpp and ggml. Thanks to the amazing work by Georgi Gerganov and contributors.

agentRuns.title: Agent Runs
agentRuns.intro: Live view of CLI coding-agent runs: streamed output, status, and where results were written.
agentRuns.emptyState: No agent runs yet. Trigger a CLI agent's hotkey to start one.

liveActivity.title: Live activity
liveActivity.empty: No agent activity yet — create an agent to see live runs here.

agents.title: Agents
agents.empty: No agents configured yet — add one to drive tools by voice.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.overTimeEmpty: No data yet — start dictating to see your trend.

recent.title: Recent dictations
recent.empty: No dictations yet — your recent transcriptions will appear here.

footer.portableUpdateMessage: Portable installs cannot be updated automatically. To update: download the latest NSIS installer from GitHub Releases, install it to the same folder, then copy your Data/ folder (settings, models, recordings) from the old version to the new one.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: OpenFlow needs accessibility permissions to type transcribed text.

micPermissionDenied.generic: Microphone access was denied by the operating system. Please grant microphone permission in your system settings.
micPermissionDenied.windows: Enable microphone access in Settings → Privacy & security → Microphone (including desktop app access).
micPermissionDenied.macos: Grant microphone access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone.
micPermissionDenied.linux: Grant microphone access in your system's sound or privacy settings.

errors.noInputDevice: No audio input device was detected. Please connect a microphone or headset and try again.
errors.pasteFailed: Text could not be pasted into the active application.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the OpenFlow interface
